introCourse.card.title: Welcome to Lextures
introCourse.card.subtitle: A guided tour of navigation, learning activities, and where to get help.
introCourse.banner.title: Welcome — start with the guided intro course
introCourse.banner.body: We've added a short tour so you can learn the platform at your own pace.
introCourse.celebration.title: You've completed Welcome to Lextures!
introCourse.celebration.body: Nice work — you're ready to dive into your real coursework.
introCourse.celebration.bodyWithCredenti: Your onboarding certificate is ready to view and share.
introCourse.rail.title: Your onboarding progress
introCourse.admin.error.load: Could not load intro course status.
introCourse.admin.auditNote: Administrative actions on this platform-wide course are recorded in the audit log when auditing is enabled.
introCourse.admin.flag.title: Enable intro course
introCourse.admin.flag.description: When enabled, new users are auto-enrolled in the guided Welcome to Lextures course.
introCourse.admin.status.title: Course status
introCourse.admin.status.description: Content version, last sync, validation health, and locale coverage.
introCourse.admin.resyncConfirm.title: Re-sync intro course content?
introCourse.admin.resyncConfirm.body: This updates curriculum fixtures for all users. Learner grades and submissions are preserved.
introCourse.admin.backfillConfirm.title: Run enrollment backfill?
introCourse.admin.backfillConfirm.body: Eligible existing users who are not yet enrolled will be added as students.
introCourse.admin.analytics.title: Completion analytics
introCourse.admin.analytics.description: Aggregate enrollment and module funnel for judging onboarding effectiveness.
introCourse.admin.analytics.empty: No analytics yet — enroll students to see funnel data.
